{
  "items": [
    {
      "requirement": "Confidentiality obligations must be defined and enforced.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "low",
      "explanation": "The agreement includes clear confidentiality obligations that both parties must adhere to.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 1. Confidentiality",
        "1.1 Each party agrees to hold in confidence all Confidential Information received from the other party."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed as the requirement is met.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Indemnification clauses must be present.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "low",
      "explanation": "The agreement includes an indemnification clause that protects both parties.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 2. Indemnification",
        "2.1 Each party shall indemnify and hold harmless the other party from and against any claims, damages, and losses."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed as the requirement is met.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Limitation of liability must be defined.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "low",
      "explanation": "The agreement specifies a limitation of liability for both parties.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 3. Limitation of Liability",
        "3.1 Neither party shall be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed as the requirement is met.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Governing law must be specified.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "low",
      "explanation": "The agreement specifies that it is governed by the laws of California.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 4. Governing Law",
        "4.1 This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of California."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed as the requirement is met.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Termination clauses must be included.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "low",
      "explanation": "The agreement includes a termination clause allowing either party to terminate with notice.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 5. Termination",
        "5.1 Either party may terminate this Agreement upon fifteen (15) days' written notice."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed as the requirement is met.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Data protection compliance must be addressed.",
      "status": "pass",
      "severity": "medium",
      "explanation": "The agreement includes a clause requiring compliance with applicable data protection laws.",
      "evidence": [
        "Section 6. Data Protection",
        "6.1 Both parties shall comply with applicable data protection laws."
      ],
      "remediation": "No remediation needed as the requirement is met.",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Audit rights must be included.",
      "status": "fail",
      "severity": "high",
      "explanation": "The agreement does not include any provisions for audit rights.",
      "evidence": [],
